description_long: This object depicts a pair of modern detached houses situated on a landscaped plot with terraced levels and retaining walls. Each house features a flat roof, large rectangular windows, and a combination of white and wood-toned exterior finishes. The houses are separated by a central pathway and surrounded by green lawns and paved walkways, with steps and ramps providing access across the sloped terrain. The rear of the property includes additional structures or garages, finished in a muted color. The site is bordered by retaining walls that follow the natural slope, and the overall layout is geometric and organized. The design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A pair of modern, flat-roofed houses with large windows, wood accents, and landscaped terraces on a sloped plot with retaining walls and paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing both houses, their main entrances, large windows, and the landscaped terraces with pathways and retaining walls.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slope of the terrain, the elevation changes, and the rear structures or garages behind the houses.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back sides of the houses and the muted-colored rear structures, with the retaining wall and slope most visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side and front of one house, the entry pathway, and the integration of the house with the sloped landscape.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple doors, small porches, and steps integrated into the terraced landscaping, with minimal decorative elements.
